title: Certificates issued to energy workers (Valstybės duomenų agentūra)
description:
[Publisher: Valstybės duomenų agentūra] The data set shall contain data on certificates issued to Lithuanian energy workers in the Energy Evaluation Information System (EDIS) from 2024. The package shall include information on the certificate issued (authorisation given, field of activity and sector, period of validity) and the certification carried out by the certification body (name of the body, date and place of examination).
Control of the certification of energy workers is one of the functions of the State Energy Regulatory Council (VERT). The Law of the Republic of Lithuania on Energy provides that the employees who install and operate energy facilities, facilities must be suitably qualified and prepared to carry out the necessary tasks. Energy workers certified in accordance with the procedure laid down by legal acts shall ensure safe, efficient and quality installation and/or operation of energy facilities. This makes it possible to ensure the sustainable functioning of the energy sector.
Data provider shall mean the State Energy Regulatory Council.
Contact the atverimas@stat.gov.lt for technical questions or possible errors
